Get involved

About

A week with a bigger purpose.

Leicester Space Week celebrates a city that has long looked up—and creates new routes into the opportunities space can offer.

Exploring innovation together

The Week brings research, enterprise, skills, culture and public wonder into one citywide programme. It is an amplifier for the people and institutions already building Leicester’s space future.

Why Leicester

Everything is here. The Week puts it on one stage.

Research excellence, business infrastructure and public reach already exist across the city. The Week connects them in one unmistakable programme.

01 — Heritage

65 years in orbit

The University of Leicester’s first instrument flew in 1961. A Leicester-built presence in space has continued since 1967.

02 — Infrastructure

A working Space City

Space Park Leicester is a live hub for research, industry and enterprise—built with university, industry and government.

03 — Momentum

A growth priority

Space and Earth observation are recognised regional beacon sectors, creating a powerful moment to connect people and opportunity.

LEICESTER SPACE WEEKExploring innovation together

A citywide platform for space innovation, sustainability, skills and public engagement—built with Leicester’s research, industry and civic partners.
